title: The Cave That Isn't There
body: A magick cave has been sighted beyond the western fields — by some. Sharpen your Perception and you may see it more often. Those who step inside speak of whispers, rune shards, and coins that weren't there before.

title: Professions & Daily Work
body: Martena, Watchman Hale, and Captain Brammel are hiring. Join a trade for daily tasks — patrol the roads, bake the morning bread, or land the day's catch — for gold and town reputation.

title: Chests Now Wander
body: Looted chests vanish and restock somewhere in town every few minutes. Keep your eyes open — Perception grows with every find.
